title: thymus serpyllum var. pallens
intro: Thymus serpyllum var. pallens, also known as dwarf thyme or creeping thyme, is a low-growing, spreading perennial herb native to Europe and North Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory compounds that can help soothe wounds, reduce inflammation, and combat infections. The health benefits of Thymus serpyllum var. pallens include its ability to support immune function, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote a restful night's sleep. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and topical ointments, making it a versatile and accessible natural remedy for various health concerns.
